proof_boundary: This artifact proves H_(5,n)(-100)>0 only for 0<=n<=316. It does not prove the analytic tail, all-shift order-five entry, forward invariance, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: The raw order-five determinant is a positive lower-cone scale times one bounded stable margin.
Merged outward-rounded Arb sources enclose every A_k(-100) needed by the prefix.
All denominator factors in the exact stable scale are strictly positive on the complete prefix.
rows.formula: d_k>0, G_n>0, F_n>0 on every index used for 0<=n<=316

rows.claim: Every stable order-five margin J_n is strictly positive through n=316.
The scale-free relative order-five margin remains strictly positive throughout the prefix.
The actual contiguous order-five determinant is strictly positive through n=316 at lambda=-100.
rows.proof_boundary: Rigorous finite prefix; no all-shift promotion.

rows.claim: Prove the stable order-five margin for the infinite tail beginning at n=317.
rows.proof_boundary: Open analytic tail; not an all-shift order-five theorem.

status: rigorous finite lambda=-100 contiguous order-five prefix through n=316
